MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: STEVEN MACDONALD FOR PLAINTIF BLAIRE HANSEN
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY JOEL LIBERSON FOR DEFENDANT SVETLANA SAMARINA AND YURI GALASHKOK

ATTORNEY MACDONALD EXERCISED HIS 170.6 CHALLENGE AGAINST JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREW WESTLEY.
HE WAS SWORN IN AND ARGUMENT GIVEN. MR. MACDONALD ARGUED THAT HIS CLIENTS INTEREST MIGHT BE PREJUDICED AS HE AND MR. WESTLEY ARE ADVERSARIES. COMMISSIONER REASSIGNED SETTLEMENT TO PRO TEM JASON STEIN.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT 1)FOR RESTITUTION OF 250 8TH AVENUE 2)STAY OF EXECUTION TO 4/30/06 3)NO FURTHER STAYS ALLOWED 4)DEFENDANT TO PAY PAST DUE RENT EQUAL TO 2 MONTHS RENT AND RENT FROM NOVEMBER THROUGH APRIL 2006 5)MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS 6)PLAINTIFF TO RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT PER STATE LAW 7)$1000 RELOCATION FEE PAID TO DEFENDANT PER STATE ORDINANCE 8)ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND DEEMED ABANDONED 9)PLAINTIFF TO PAY $6000 RELOCATION EXPENSE AS FOLLOWS:$3000 ON 1/31/06 WITHOUT ANY CONDITIONS; $3000 WILL BE HELD BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND DISBURSED WHEN DEFENDANTS SURRENDER PREMISES AND SIGN PAPER BY 11:59PM 4/30/06 10)IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY PLAINTIFF, WITH 24 HOUR NOTICE, TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT RESTITUTION AND THE $3000 BALANCE WILL NOT BE DISBURSED
11)IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, PLIANTIFF TO DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF VACATING. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN DOCUMENT TO BE SIGNED BY DEFENDANTS AND BE RETURNED WITHIN ONE WEEK. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JASON STEIN ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: LORI CHESHIRE (218)
